description: Hover any tech word — hear how it's actually pronounced. 1848-entry sourced dictionary covering products, CLI tools, CS terms, AI/ML projects and researchers, and the cross-functional vocab (GTM, PLG, ARR, OKR, scrum, kanban …) tech folks use. Cross-platform: macOS `say`, Linux `espeak-ng`, Windows PowerShell. Works in VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, VSCodium, Zed. 中文界面：程序员单词怎么读、英文技术词发音、读音词典 — 悬停即听 kubectl、nginx、Ollama 等读法。
cmd.speak.title: Speak word
cmd.speakSelection.title: Speak current selection
cmd.search.title: Search dictionary…
cmd.openWebsite.title: Open dictionary website
cmd.star.title: ★ Star on GitHub
cmd.sponsor.title: ☕ Buy me a coffee (Ko-fi)
cmd.openWalkthrough.title: Show welcome / how to use
config.voice.desc: Voice for the macOS `say` backend (macOS only — Linux espeak / Windows PowerShell use the platform default voice). Run `say -v '?'` for the full list. Recommended: Samantha, Daniel, Karen, Moira, Tessa.
config.rate.desc: Speech rate in words per minute.
config.repetitions.desc: Times to repeat the word. CLI default is 3; hover is more annoying when repeated, so default here is 1.
config.hoverEnabled.desc: Show pronunciation popup on hover for known tech words.
config.hoverOnlyKnownWords.desc: Only show hover for words in the dictionary. Disable to also hover unknown words (uses TTS letter-to-sound, lower quality).
config.statusBar.desc: Show a 🔊 Pronounce item in the status bar (click to speak the current selection).
walkthrough.title: Welcome to Pronounce
walkthrough.description: Hover any tech word → hear how engineers actually say it. 1848 sourced entries. Cross-platform (macOS / Linux / Windows) as of v0.3.
walkthrough.try.title: Hear it — try kubectl, nginx, or YAML
walkthrough.try.description:
Run `Pronounce: Speak word` to hear any dictionary entry. The fastest way: highlight a word in any file and press **⌘⇧'** (or run `Pronounce: Speak current selection`).

[Hear `kubectl` now](command:pronounce.speak?%22kubectl%22)
walkthrough.hover.title: Hover any tech word
walkthrough.hover.description:
Hover over `kubectl`, `nginx`, `GIF`, `YAML`, `Ghostty`, `wagmi`, `JSON` etc. in any file — a tooltip shows the IPA, the English-style respelling, the source citation, and a 🔊 Play button. Works in **any** language file.

[Open a sample file](command:pronounce.openWalkthrough)
walkthrough.search.title: Search all 1848 entries
walkthrough.search.description:
Run `Pronounce: Search dictionary…` from the command palette (⌘⇧P / Ctrl+Shift+P) and fuzzy-find any word.

[Open search now](command:pronounce.search)
walkthrough.star.title: ★ Star it · keeps the dictionary growing
walkthrough.star.description:
If Pronounce just saved you one cringey standup moment, **one star is the single best way to keep the dictionary growing** — more devs find it, more PRs land, more entries get creator-clarified.

[★ Star on GitHub](command:pronounce.starOnGitHub)
[Visit pronounce.renlab.ai](command:pronounce.openWebsite)

Optional: [☕ Coffee on Ko-fi](command:pronounce.sponsor) — pays for one new entry per cup.
